title: set_message_reaction/remove/edit_message_body lost-update race
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1567-1651: set_message_reaction, remove_message_reaction, and edit_message_body each do SELECT then UPDATE with no transaction across the pair. Two concurrent callers read the same stale JSON, modify independently, and both write back — the second write silently discards the first change. Fix: wrap each function in self.pool.begin() with IMMEDIATE isolation so the read-modify-write is atomic.
